plugins.name: drupal-skills
plugins.description: 15 skills for generating correct Drupal 10/11 module code. Covers module scaffolding, entities, routing, forms, plugins, caching, theming, testing, Views, batch processing, access control, config management, database API, Drush, and coding standards.

plugins.name: drupal-tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development discipline for Drupal modules: red/green/refactor cadence, outside-in test ordering, and test-first feature growth. Pairs with drupal-skills' drupal-testing.
